description: 平台 PAUSED(临时熔断)→ SDK 停收新 task,但不下线,等下次 heartbeat 撤销

then.sdkExpectedAction: transition FSM to PAUSED; pause Kafka assignment; in-flight tasks continue; if a Kafka message with taskType in pausedTaskTypes already received, drop without commit (will redeliver after platform unpauses); on next heartbeat if platformStatus back to NORMAL → resume Kafka assignment
